languages.text: {n}Альва-9 молча преклоняет голову. Из ее вокса раздается на удивление негромкая и мелодичная бинарная трель.{/n}
{n}Alva-9 bows her head, saying nothing. A surprisingly quiet and melodic binharic trill comes from her vox.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Альва-9 молча преклоняет голову. Из ее вокса раздается на удивление негромкая и мелодичная бинарная трель.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Alva-9 bows her head, saying nothing. A surprisingly quiet and melodic binharic trill comes from her vox.{/n}
{n}Alva-9 bows her head, saying nothing. A surprisingly quiet and melodic binharic trill comes from her vox.{/n}
{n}Alva-9 bows her head, saying nothing. A surprisingly quiet and melodic binharic trill comes from her vox.{/n}

languages.text: {n}アルバ9は頭を下げ、何も言わない。彼女のボイスからは、予想外に静かでメロディアスなビナリックのトリルが奏でられる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Alva-9 bows her head, saying nothing. A surprisingly quiet and melodic binharic trill comes from her vox.{/n}

traits.locale_text: アルバ9は頭を下げ、何も言わない。彼女のボイスからは、予想外に静かでメロディアスなビナリックのトリルが奏でられる。

languages.text: {n}Alva-9 inclina la cabeza sin decir nada. Un trino binario sorprendentemente callado y melódico surge de su voco.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Alva-9 bows her head, saying nothing. A surprisingly quiet and melodic binharic trill comes from her vox.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Alva-9 inclina la cabeza sin decir nada. Un trino binario sorprendentemente callado y melódico surge de su voco.{/n}

languages.text: {n}阿尔瓦-9低头不语。她的音阵中传来一阵出奇轻柔，甚至带着韵律的二进制颤音。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Alva-9 bows her head, saying nothing. A surprisingly quiet and melodic binharic trill comes from her vox.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}阿尔瓦-9低头不语。她的音阵中传来一阵出奇轻柔，甚至带着韵律的二进制颤音。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Alva-9 neigt schweigend den Kopf. Aus ihrem Vox ertönt ein überraschend leises und melodisches binhärisches Trillern.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Alva-9 bows her head, saying nothing. A surprisingly quiet and melodic binharic trill comes from her vox.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Alva-9 neigt schweigend den Kopf. Aus ihrem Vox ertönt ein überraschend leises und melodisches binhärisches Trillern.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Alva-9, hiçbir şey söylemeden başını eğiyor. Voksundan şaşırtıcı derecede sessiz ve melodik bir ikilidil nağme duyuluyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Alva-9 bows her head, saying nothing. A surprisingly quiet and melodic binharic trill comes from her vox.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Alva-9, hiçbir şey söylemeden başını eğiyor. Voksundan şaşırtıcı derecede sessiz ve melodik bir ikilidil nağme duyuluyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Alva-9 baisse la tête sans rien dire. Un trille binhaire étonnamment calme et mélodieux s'échappe de son vox.{/n}
